notes: Node 2.31 retries the DV5→HDR10 NVENC re-encode up to 3x. On some GPUs (notably the RTX 3060) opening NVENC alongside the Vulkan tone-map device fails intermittently ('Error while opening encoder'), even at 1 concurrent job — a retry almost always succeeds, so an occasional open-failure no longer errors the whole job (a genuinely bad file still fails after 3 tries, with a 5s backoff between attempts). Carries 2.30's orphan reaper and 2.29's temp-prep timeout guards. The 5080 is unaffected (it never hit the open-failure); this makes the 3060 reliable for DV→P8 too.
